titleStmt.title: SII 27.104: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 104. (A.R. No. 284 of 1936-37.) PERDŪRU, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up near a field called Garaḍi Kumbaḷagadde at Vāṇṭyāla.

This record registers a gift of land in Śivapura, to Kavi Śaṅkarabhaṭṭa son of Kavi Kṛishṇabhaṭṭa of the Śrīmaṭha at Siṅgēṛi (Śriṅgēri), in lieu of 80 kāṭi-gadyāṇas due to him as varttaneya-kaṭṭaḷe, at the instance of the king, by mahāpradhāna Chandappa who was governing Bārakūra-Tūḷu-rājya. The gift was made with the consent of the villagers of Śivapura.
It is dated Śaka 1354 (current), Virōdhakṛit, Kārttika śu. 1, Monday. The tithi corresponds to 1431 A.D., October 7 when the weekday was Sunday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . namastuṁga śiraccuṁbi caṁdra cāmara cāravē trai
lōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śakavarṣa sāvi
radamunūṟa Aivattu nālkaneya vartamāna virodhikṛtsaṁvatsarada kārtika śu 1 sō lu śrīmanmahā
rājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa dēvarāya mahārāyaru vijayanagariya rājasiṁhā
sanadalū sukhasaṁkathā vinōdadiṁ sakalavarnnāśrama dharmmagaḷanū pratipālisuva kā
ladalu śrīmanmahāpradhāna caṁdapagaḷū bārakūra tuḷurājyavanu pratipālisu
valli Ā caṁdappagaḷu rāyara nirūpadiṁda siṁgēriya śrīmaṭhada kavi kruṣṇabhaṭṭara makka
ḷu kavi śaṁkarabhaṭṭarige koṭṭa dharmmaśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare nivage bārakūra cāvaḍiya
parivārada kaṁdācārada voḷage prāpa pramāṇinalu nivage naḍadu baha varttaneya
kaṭṭaḷege koṭṭu baha kāṭi yeṁbhattu hoṁnnige koṭṭadu kudurnāḍa śivapurada grāma
davaḷage kuḷada bhūmige Aramaneya vahigū prāpa pramāṇinalū Anādi
gālamodalāgi naṣṭanilavāgi biddu bahakuḷa mūḍe 65 Aṟuvattaidaṟa voḷa
ge niṁma varttaneya yeṁbhattu hoṁniṁge koṭṭabhūmiya sthaḷadavivara naṁburājana
beṭṭu kuḷa mūḍe 1 hāne 32 . Eḷaṟaḷḷiyali Allāḷa bhaṭṭārakana mu 4 hā 1 nu beḷi
lapaḷiṁ mū 1 hā 4 Aṁṇamaṇiyiṁda hā 15 yīsvara hōve yaṁda
nya 1 l kuṁnakkana śivaniṁda hā 6 Ariya kōṭīsvaraniṁda mū 1 hā 15 tāḍi
nāraṇaniṁda hā 17 dāsaribeṭṭu mū 1 hā 22 Attipāṭi hā 26 Aḷu
vana taṁbi yiṁda mū 2 hā 1 . kudurabāje śivaniṁda hā 30 mahādēvana
gaddeyaṁda hā32 kruṣṇayili koḍaniṁda mū 2 Aṁntu mū 17 hā 30 . Akṣāra
dalū kuḷa naṣṭa mūḍe hadinēḷu hāne mūvattu varegeṁ prati mū 1 kkaṁ kuḷateṟu
prāku pramāṇa kāṭi ga 4 . lekkadalū kāṭi ga 80 Akṣāradalū kāṭigadyāṇa E
ṁbhattu honnina naṣṭa sthaḷavanū niṁma vartanege Ā śivapurada grāmadavara samakṣa
yadalū dhārāpūrvvakavāgi mūlavāgi sarvvamānyavāgi koṭṭevāgi �yo naṣṭasthaḷa
doḷaguḷa Aṣṭabhōga tēja svāmya sahavāgi Ā bhūmiyanū nīvē kālakā
ladalli rūpamāḍikoṁḍu Anubhavisi bahiri yī śāśana pramāṇima bhū
miyanū niṁmmavarttaneya Eṁbhatu honnige Uttarisi koṁḍu nāḍu grā
mada Anāya maḷavreya muṁtāgi Enubaṁdarū �yo bhūmiyanū nāvu
sarvvamānyavāgi dhāreyaneṟadu koṭṭevāgi niUniṁma putra pautrakavāgi
sukhadiṁda Ā caṁdrārkkasthāyigaḷāgi bhōgisi barutta bahiri Eṁdu koṭṭaśāsana caṁdappana bara Eṁdu koṭṭa śāsana is engraved above the line.
yi bāḷina sidāyake Ū yi kavi śaṁkara bhaṭṭaru niṁmma svāṁmyakke grāmadavaru Ā śaṁ
karabhaṭṭarū . śivapurada grāmadavaru Oppa śrī śaṁkara dēvaru . dānapālanayō
rmmadhyē dānācrēyōnu pālanaṁ dānātsvargga mavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ
yi dharmmava pālisidavarige kōṭiliṁgada pratiṣṭeya māḍidapuṇya . gāmēkāṁ
mruttikāmēkāṁ bhūmērapyēkamaṁgulaṁ haraṁ narakamāpnōti yāvadābhū
ta saṁplavaṁ . �yo dharmake tapidavarige vāraṇāsiyalu sāvira kapileya
koṁdapāpa . �yo dharma yavādavarige kāśiyali da puṁṇya
vapudu maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 27.104 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
